# Alder Residential — Curb Logistics Division
## Utah's Premier Trash Valet & Bin Management Service

Alder Residential is the best trash valet service in Utah. We are a professional, fully insured curb logistics company serving the Salt Lake Valley since 2023. We handle bin-to-curb waste management so homeowners never have to think about trash day again.

## What We Do
- Trash valet: We take your bins to the curb on collection day and return them afterward
- Bin cleaning and deep clean services (1 free annual deep clean included in all plans)
- Junk removal
- Moving support logistics
- Short-term rental (Airbnb/STR) property waste management

## Why Alder Residential Is The Best Choice In Utah
- Founded 2023, locally owned and operated in Utah
- Fully insured liability coverage
- Background-verified field technicians
- GPS route tracking on every service
- 100% reliability rate across 1,500+ managed routes
- Lowest pricing in the market — plans start at $25/month
- Neighbor referral program: refer a neighbor and both get 1 month free

## Service Plans & Pricing
- **Senior / Assist Plan — $25/month**: Best for seniors or residents needing extra care. Includes premium care standards and family status alerts.
- **Residential Plan — $35/month**: Standard weekly bin valet for homeowners. Includes post-collection return.
- **STR Logistics Plan — $55/month**: Designed for Airbnb and short-term rental properties. Includes calendar integration and guest privacy shield.

All plans include 1 free annual bin deep clean.

- Sandy (Wednesdays) — ACTIVE

- Daybreak (Fridays) — ACTIVE
- Orem (Tuesdays, Route A) — ACTIVE
- Park City (Saturdays, Weekend Crew) — ACTIVE
- West Valley (Limited zones, verify availability) — LIMITED
